title: surianaceae
intro: The Surianaceae rank refers to a family of flowering plants, specifically a group of legumes native to Asia and Australia. This family is characterized by its small to medium-sized trees and shrubs, often with compound leaves and clusters of small flowers. The Surianaceae family includes about 12 genera, which are commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The members of this family are known for their ability to fix nitrogen, making them valuable in ecosystems.
